description_long: This is a single slip-on shoe with a vibrant magenta upper, constructed from a textured fabric that appears slightly worn in places. The shoe features a low-cut design with a rounded toe and a simple seam running along the side and front. The interior lining is a lighter shade of pink, and the heel has a vertical seam for reinforcement. The outsole is flat and made of a light-colored rubber or synthetic material, providing a subtle contrast to the upper. There are no visible logos or branding elements, and the shoe lacks any lacing or fastening system, emphasizing its slip-on nature.
description: A magenta slip-on shoe with a textured fabric upper, light pink lining, and a flat light-colored sole. The shoe shows some signs of wear and has no visible branding or laces.
description_view_0: Side view showing the magenta textured upper, seam details, and the flat light-colored sole.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the vertical heel seam and the open slip-on design.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same textured upper and sole, with visible wear near the toe.
description_view_3: Front view showing the rounded toe, slip-on opening, and the shoe's overall width.
